title: The Murshidabad Estate Administration Act, 1933
full_text: The Murshidabad Estate Administration Act, 1933 मुर्शिदाबाद संपदा प्रशासन अधिनियम,1933 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193323 Act Number: 23 Enactment Date: 1933-09-21 Act Year: 1933 Short Title: The Murshidabad Estate Administration Act, 1933 Hindi Title: मुर्शिदाबाद संपदा प्रशासन अधिनियम,1933 Long Title: An Act to provide for the appointment of a Manager on behalf of the Secretary of State of the properties of the Nawab Bahadur or Murshidabad and define the powers and duties of the Manager. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 21-09-1933 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Murshidabad Estate Administration Act, 1933 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Appointment of Manager. Section 4. Effect of order under section 3. Section 5. Suits and appeals during management. Section 6. Manager to receive rents, issues and profits. Section 7. Application by Manager of sums received. Section 8. Notice to claimants. Section 9. Presentation of claims. Section 10. Debt not duly notified to be barred. Section 11. Determination of debts. Section 12. Power to inquire into consideration for leases, etc. Section 13. Appeals to Board of Revenue. Section 14. Scheme for settlement of debts. Section 15. Power to call for further particulars. Section 16. Power to summon witnesses. Section 17. Investigation to be deemed a judicial proceeding. Section 18. Power to order production of accounts, papers, etc., and evidence of title . Section 19. Powers of Manager for realisation of rents, etc. Section 20. Power to lease. Section 21. Power of Manager to contract and take action for the benefit of the estate. Section 22. Powers or supervision and control. Section 23. Manager to be deemed a public servant. Section 24. Recovery of fines. Section 25. Bar of suits, etc., against certain persons. Section 26. Power of State Government to make orders. Section 27. Effect of withdrawal from entry by State Government. Section 28. Power to make rules.
